title: KreativeKraft Luxury Christmas Crackers, Set of 6 Deluxe Xmas Crackers, Plushies Hanging Xmas Tree Ornaments, Fun Novelty Party Gifts Christmas Decor (Green)
features: Category F1 Fun Christmas Crackers - Bring extra cheer to your celebrations with these festive crackers. Suitable for ages 3+, each pack contains 6 crackers with fun surprises
Cute Plush Toys - Each cracker contains a unique soft toy with a loop for hanging, a colourful paper hat, and a joke, offering festive surprises and plenty of laughter for everyone
Convenient Pack of 6 - This set includes 6 crackers, making it easy to prepare for small gatherings or intimate Christmas dinners with just the right amount of festive flair
Perfect for Family Fun - Enhance your Christmas dinner with our exciting crackers. Filled with charming plush ornaments, colourful hats, and fun surprises, they'll make mealtime even more memorable!
Explore More - Check the images for more features and details on these delightful Christmas crackers and exactly what's included
